items.headline: Fortinet (Nasdaq: FTNT) reports strong Q1 2026 results: revenue $1.85B (+20% YoY), product revenue $645M (+41% YoY), and billings $2.09B (+31% YoY)
Fortinet (NASDAQ: FTNT) expands FortiGate G series with new FortiGate 3500G and FortiGate 400G firewalls for high-performance data center and enterprise edge security
